case_title: ANDREW HOWARD VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANDREW HOWARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TRICIA PEARSE WILLIAMS (CLAIM ADJUSTER). DEFENDANT CCSF INFORMS COURT THAT THEIR PARTY IS READY TO SETTLE OUTSIDE COURT. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST BY PARTIES AS SETTLEMENT REACHED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED (JUDGE'S COPY). JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
